summary: Round 3 addressed 85 findings across 4 agents (quality, security, performance, DX). 32 fixes applied, build remains green (2469 tests, 0 type errors, 0 lint errors, 71 pre-existing lint warnings). Key wins: (1) Zod validation added at API boundary for task/project/tag CRUD routes, (2) 10MB global body-size limit middleware, (3) sensitive settings redacted on GET, (4) AIContext, VoiceContext, and PluginContext provider values memoized with useMemo, (5) TaskItemContent/TaskItemActions wrapped in React.memo, (6) dead modules from rounds 1-2 (message-utils.ts, task-extraction-patterns.ts) finally wired up, (7) 8 silent catch patterns replaced with console.warn, (8) 3 ErrorBoundaries added (Sidebar, TaskDetailPanel, AIChatPanel), (9) PluginView infinite retry loop capped at 10 with exponential backoff, (10) DEFAULT_LMSTUDIO_BASE_URL extracted to config/defaults.ts. One architectural critical remains: plugin sandbox is a no-op (SEC-R3-03) — plugins run in the main process with full access. This requires vm/worker_threads isolation and is not a patch-level fix.
focus_next_round: SEC-R3-04 through SEC-R3-13: Add Zod validation to remaining API routes (sections, comments, templates, AI chat, timeblocking RPC) — 10 medium-severity input validation gaps
PERF-301: Batch settings endpoint (52 individual GET requests on mount → 1)
PERF-302: Batch plugin state endpoint (5 API calls on mount → 1)
PERF-307/313/314: Memoize Date allocations in render paths (TaskItem, Today, Upcoming)
PERF-308/309: Memoize buildChildStats and flattenVisible in TaskList
PERF-311: Remove taskCount as dependency for project/tag refetch in useAppState
SEC-R3-15/16: Sanitize external API error messages before forwarding to client (voice proxy, AI chat SSE)
Q3-05: Extract shared fetchWithTimeout utility from 3 AI provider adapters
